brief_notes: Highly structured Results with Context/Approach/Finding/Interpretation frames. Numerical claims faithfully match extraction (5,372 neurons, 444 projecting, 38%/32%, chi2 p=0.012, 21% vs 15% p=0.00022, 7.4% vs 3.8% p=0.00031, t(3)=7.485 p=0.00494, slopes, quartiles, GLM contrasts all verified). Discussion is substantive with limitations. One ambiguity in EYFP mouth p (reports both 0.309 and 0.617).
